scripts.postinstall: cd landing && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n landing,admin -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:admin && npm run assemble
scripts.assemble: rm -rf dist && cp -r landing/dist dist && mkdir -p dist/admin && cp -r admin/dist/frontbarberia/browser/* dist/admin/
